## Review checklist

- [ ] The doc clearly separates confirmed TROCCO API behavior from assumptions.
- [ ] Read-only tools and write/run actions are described separately.
- [ ] Inputs, outputs, error payloads, and required environment variables are documented.
- [ ] Operational risk and rollback/stop conditions are included when an action changes or runs TROCCO resources.
- [ ] Examples do not contain secrets or production-only identifiers unless intentionally documented.

## Verification

- [ ] Links and command examples were checked.
- [ ] Related schema/client/action PRs or issues are linked below.
